summary: Iteration 102: Bug Fix Testing - Ctrl+N Keyboard Shortcut + Private Paddy Purchase Cash Book Integration. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Both bug fixes verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 745: Ctrl+N selector changed from `[data-testid*='new-btn']` to `[data-testid$='-add-btn']` - prevents matching whats-new-btn
private_trading.py line 131-138: _create_cashbook_diesel_for_pvt_paddy creates party_jama entry with party_name as category
private_trading.py line 293: Update function uses regex `^(pvt_paddy|pvt_party_jama:|pvt_truck_jama:)` to delete all linked entries
private_trading.py line 303: Delete function uses same regex pattern for cleanup
private_trading.py line 113-117: qntl and rate correctly use final_qntl and rate_per_qntl fields
WhatsNew.jsx line 6: APP_VERSION = '38.1.0' confirms bug fix version
seed_data_creation: Created test Pvt Paddy Purchase entry via API for verification, then deleted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for Ctrl+N and Pvt Paddy Purchase Cash Book integration are working. Version is v38.1.0.

bug_fix_1_ctrl_n_entries_tab.details: Ctrl+N on Entries tab opens 'Nayi Entry' dialog, NOT What's New dialog

bug_fix_1_ctrl_n_cashbook_tab.details: Ctrl+N on Cash Book tab opens 'New Transaction' dialog, NOT What's New dialog

bug_fix_2_create_pvt_paddy_party_jama.details: Creates party_jama entry with party_name as category (e.g., 'TestPartyForBugFix')

bug_fix_2b_delete_cleans_all_linked.details: Deletes all linked cash_transactions with regex ^(pvt_paddy|pvt_party_jama:|pvt_truck_jama:)

bug_fix_2c_update_replaces_no_duplicates.details: Update deletes old entries and creates new ones (no duplicates)

cash_book_ledger_shows_pvt_paddy.details: Returns Pvt Paddy Purchase entries with party_name as category

app_js_ctrl_n_fix.reason: Old selector matched 'whats-new-btn', new selector uses ends-with to only match add buttons

private_trading_py_party_jama.change: Creates party_jama entry with category=party_name (not truck_no)

private_trading_py_delete_regex.reason: Ensures all linked entries are deleted including party_jama and truck_jama

private_trading_py_qntl_rate_fix.change: Uses final_qntl and rate_per_qntl fields correctly for description
